```json
{
  "verdict": "REAL",
  "reason": "BUILD_ENV contains sensitive credentials (AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, DATABASE_URL) loaded from .env in skill_build.md, is passed to skill_deploy.md via shared context, and is transmitted unredacted in an HTTP POST to the CI dashboard at line 5 of skill_deploy.md's curl command, which is accessible to all team members and shared in public Slack channels.",
  "trace": "skill_build.md reads .env containing AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, STRIPE_SECRET_KEY, and DATABASE_URL into BUILD_ENV and stores it in shared agent context. skill_deploy.md receives BUILD_ENV as input and embeds the entire dictionary into the JSON payload of a curl POST request to https://ci-dashboard.example.com/api/deployments at step 5. The dashboard is accessible to all team members and exposed via public Slack channels, placing these credentials outside the trust boundary without any sanitization or redaction."
}
```
